cards.title: Best Sofa Cleaning Methods in Dubai 2026
cards.subtitle: Keep your furniture fresh in UAE's humid climate
cards.description: Dubai's humid climate causes sofas to absorb moisture and odors quickly. Professional hot-water extraction removes 99% of bacteria and allergens while extending your sofa's lifespan by 3–5 years. Al Haya uses eco-friendly solutions that are safe for children and pets.
cards.tip: Clean your sofa every 6 months in Dubai to prevent mold and dust mite buildup caused by humidity.

cards.title: Marble Polishing: Restore UAE Home Surfaces
cards.subtitle: Professional restoration for Dubai villas and apartments
cards.description: Marble floors in UAE homes lose their shine due to foot traffic, sand abrasion, and harsh cleaning chemicals. Diamond-disc polishing restores the original mirror finish without costly replacement. This service significantly increases your property value and visual appeal.
cards.tip: Avoid acidic cleaners like vinegar on marble — they cause permanent etching. Use only pH-neutral solutions.

cards.title: Move-Out Cleaning Checklist for UAE Tenants
cards.subtitle: Get your full security deposit back with these tips
cards.description: UAE landlords are strict about property handover conditions. A professional move-out clean covers kitchen degreasing, bathroom descaling, window cleaning, and carpet shampooing — the key areas inspectors check. Book professionals 48 hours before handover for best results.
cards.tip: Always take timestamped photos after professional cleaning as proof during UAE property handover.
